headline: How The Freeport McMoRan (FCX) Story Is Shifting With Copper Views And Grasberg Developments
summary: Freeport McMoRan’s fair value estimate has shifted from US$64.02 to US$66.47, an uplift of about 3.8% that puts the spotlight firmly on how the market is recalibrating expectations for the stock. This move lines up with active Street research, where several firms are reworking models and targets as they update copper price assumptions and factor in recent developments around Grasberg and Q4 realized pricing. As you read on, you will see how these changing targets feed into the evolving...

headline: A Look At Freeport McMoRan (FCX) Valuation As Grasberg Restart Risks And Copper Volatility Sway Sentiment
summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) is in the spotlight after the 2025 mudslide at its Grasberg mine, the planned 2026 phased restart, and choppy copper prices linked to Middle East tensions, which have pulled investor attention back to risk. See our latest analysis for Freeport-McMoRan. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 1-day share price return showing a 5.27% decline and a 7-day share price return showing a 12.81% decline, even though the 90-day share price return of 31.33% and 1-year total...

headline: Freeport Grasberg Extension And Restart Plans Meet Valuation And Risk Questions
summary: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE:FCX) has extended its mining rights at the Grasberg mine in Indonesia, securing operational control through at least 2041. The company agreed to expanded community investment commitments as part of the renewed terms with the Indonesian government. Freeport-McMoRan is preparing a phased restart of the Grasberg Block Cave underground mine later this year. For investors watching NYSE:FCX, the Grasberg extension secures access to one of the world's largest copper and gold...

headline: Trump encourages Latin American leaders to use military action to help the U.S. fight cartels
summary: Trump encouraged regional leaders to take military action against drug trafficking cartels and transnational gangs.
